steps.name: create_pr
steps.summary: Create a pull request from workflow context data.

steps.name: get_pull_request
steps.summary: Fetch a pull request and expose it to downstream steps.

steps.name: merge_pull_request
steps.summary: Merge a pull request with workflow-selected merge options.

steps.name: verify_pull_request_state
steps.summary: Validate PR state before continuing a workflow.

steps.name: ai_suggest_pr_description
steps.summary: Generate PR title and body from branch changes using AI.

steps.name: prompt_for_pr_title
steps.summary: Prompt for a pull request title.

steps.name: prompt_for_pr_body
steps.summary: Prompt for a pull request body.

steps.name: prompt_for_issue_body_step
steps.summary: Prompt for free-form issue input before AI expansion.

steps.name: prompt_for_self_assign
steps.summary: Ask whether the current user should be assigned.

steps.name: prompt_for_labels
steps.summary: Prompt for GitHub labels to attach to an issue or PR.

steps.name: select_cli
steps.summary: Select which external CLI should be used by a workflow.

steps.name: ai_suggest_issue_title_and_body
steps.summary: Generate issue content from user input and templates using AI.

steps.name: preview_and_confirm_issue
steps.summary: Preview generated issue content and confirm creation.

steps.name: create_issue
steps.summary: Create the GitHub issue from workflow context data.

steps.name: select_pr_for_review
steps.summary: Select a pull request that needs response or review.

steps.name: fetch_pending_comments
steps.summary: Load unresolved PR comments into workflow context.

steps.name: check_clean_state
steps.summary: Ensure the current branch state is safe before checkout.

steps.name: checkout_pr_branch
steps.summary: Switch to the PR branch while preserving original branch context.

steps.name: review_comments
steps.summary: Guide the user through comment resolution and local changes.

steps.name: push_commits
steps.summary: Push local follow-up commits back to the PR branch.

steps.name: send_comment_replies
steps.summary: Submit replies for the reviewed comments.

steps.name: request_review
steps.summary: Request another review after applying comment changes.

steps.name: checkout_original_branch
steps.summary: Restore the original branch after review work completes.

steps.name: select_pr_for_code_review
steps.summary: Choose a PR to analyze in the advanced code review pipeline.

steps.name: fetch_pr_review_bundle
steps.summary: Collect the review bundle with PR, diff, files, and discussion context.

steps.name: build_change_manifest
steps.summary: Build a structured manifest of changed files and review targets.

steps.name: build_existing_comments_index
steps.summary: Index existing review comments to avoid duplicates.

steps.name: classify_pr
steps.summary: Classify PR size and composition before review planning.

steps.name: score_review_candidates
steps.summary: Rank changed files and exclude low-value review candidates.

steps.name: build_review_checklist
steps.summary: Prepare a review checklist from PR context.

steps.name: select_review_strategy
steps.summary: Choose the review execution strategy from deterministic PR signals.

steps.name: ai_review_plan
steps.summary: Ask AI to plan the directed review strategy.

steps.name: validate_review_plan
steps.summary: Validate the AI review plan before execution.

steps.name: resolve_review_context
steps.summary: Expand the precise review contexts needed for targeted analysis.

steps.name: ai_review_findings
steps.summary: Run targeted AI analysis and produce candidate findings.

steps.name: normalize_findings
steps.summary: Normalize raw AI findings into workflow-friendly structures.

steps.name: dedupe_findings
steps.summary: Remove duplicate or overlapping findings before submission.

steps.name: build_new_comment_actions
steps.summary: Translate validated findings into GitHub review actions.

steps.name: validate_review_actions
steps.summary: Validate review actions before posting comments.

steps.name: submit_review_actions
steps.summary: Submit review comments or review actions to GitHub.

steps.name: build_thread_review_candidates
steps.summary: Collect review threads that may need follow-up decisions.

steps.name: build_thread_review_contexts
steps.summary: Expand the context required to evaluate thread resolution.

steps.name: ai_thread_resolution
steps.summary: Ask AI whether open review threads should be resolved or reopened.

steps.name: normalize_thread_decisions
steps.summary: Normalize thread resolution decisions for workflow execution.

steps.name: build_thread_actions
steps.summary: Build GitHub actions for thread resolution decisions.

steps.name: create_worktree
steps.summary: Create an isolated worktree for GitHub-focused workflow tasks.

steps.name: cleanup_worktree
steps.summary: Remove a worktree created during workflow execution.
